The '''''Arrestor''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] that served the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and participated in the [[Mission to the Chaykin Cluster]]. It survived the Clone Wars to serve the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
Built by [[Rothana Heavy Engineering/Legends|Rothana Heavy Engineering]], the ''Arrestor'' was a [[gray]] [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]]. Proprietary to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was not available for sale to outside organizations. It was equipped with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] that were used to assist in the destruction of at least one [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleship]].<ref name="RC" />

==History==
[[File:Arrestor.png|thumb|left|200px|''Arrestor'' attacking a [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Droid Control Ship]].]]
In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], during the [[Mission to the Chaykin Cluster]] in the [[Corbantis system/Legends|Corbantis system]], under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Talbot]], the ''Arrestor'' was called upon to assist the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] team [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] in eliminating [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] and [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] forces on the abandoned ''Acclamator''-class assault ship ''[[Prosecutor]]''. Arrestor helped to destroy a [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class Droid Control Ship]] while Delta [[Squad/Legends|Squad]] regained the operational use of ''Prosecutor''{{'s}} automated [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries.<ref name="RC" />

The ''Arrestor'' and Delta Squad were successful in repelling the CIS-Trandoshan [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] alliance, presumably bringing ''Prosecutor'' back into regular Republic use.<ref name="RC" />

The ''Arrestor'' was eventually pressed into service with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].<ref name="EAW" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
